_doc: Phase 17 cross-lang recall-validation baseline for gin-gonic/gin (Go). Re-capture by running scripts/validate_recall.sh --lang go gin <clone_path> --capture. Updated 2026-05-09 after fmt.Fprintf safe-writer suppression and Go switch container fallback fix removed two FPs.
